dialogues.text_en: Until not so very long ago, you were but one of the many adventurers seeking to make their way in Eorzea.

But for your character and courage, you were raised to the esteemed post of envoy. Thereafter, you traveled the realm, aiding those in need without thought of reward, confirming to Yda and Papalymo / Y'shtola / Thancred that the Scions would benefit from your aid. And no sooner had you joined us than you personally bested the primal Ifrit.
You have achieved a great deal in a short time, and won fame in so doing. Alas, fame does not come without a price, as you will soon discover.
We have guests, Forename ─or rather... you have guests.
Beg pardons!
Ahhh, Lady Minfilia. Radiant as always!
I am given to understand that the Scions of the Seventh Dawn have but recently welcomed a new hero into their midst!
I am here on behalf of the Maelstrom, Grand Company of Limsa Lominsa, to offer said hero a place of honor within our ranks!
As you can see, Forename , your recent exploits have garnered you the attentions of the Grand Companies of Eorzea.
Each organization would have Ifrit's bane for its own. To this end, all three have sent officers to court you.
They would not ordinarily go to such lengths to enlist a new recruit. That they have is evidence of their high regard for you.
I find myself wondering how word of Forename 's deeds spread so quickly. That the Immortal Flames should know of his / her triumph is to be expected...but what of the other Grand Companies?
Eep!
Your reputation precedes you, Master / Mistress Surname ! 'Tis no ordinary man / woman who can face a primal and emerge the victor!
And imagine our pride when we learned that you began your journey as an adventurer in our own Gridania! Know that the people hold you in high esteem, and that you will always be welcome among us.
The Order of the Twin Adder has need of valiant women such as you. Join your strength to ours, friend, and together let us ensure that peace ever reigns over the Twelveswood!
What a pleasure it is to finally meet you, Master / Mistress Surname ! My comrades speak of you in the most glowing terms!
Why, even before you aided us against the Amalj'aa and their dread primal, yours was already a respected name in Ul'dah. Our people know you and love you well.
A man / woman of your talent belongs with the Immortal Flames. Join your strength to ours, friend, and together let us secure a prosperous future for Ul'dah!
The Admiral was not exaggerating when she said you have the look of a hero! Full often does she speak of you, friend.
As do many others in Limsa. Long before the rest of Eorzea took note, your name was well known to us, owing to your valorous deeds on behalf of our citizens.
It is only natural that we should want you for the Maelstrom. Join your strength to ours, and together let us see the grand vessel of Limsa Lominsa to the shores of glory!
Lady Minfilia!
<sigh> Very well...

Though I am quite sure you need no reminding, mayhap a brief summary of the situation would help to clarify your thoughts on this matter. As you know, the Grand Companies are all-encompassing organizations empowered to call upon the martial, economic, and technological resources of their respective city-states in times of strife.
There are presently three such organizations in Eorzea: the Maelstrom of Limsa Lominsa, the Order of the Twin Adder of Gridania, and the Immortal Flames of Ul'dah.
Serving a Grand Company means serving the nation to which it belongs. You will be charged with its defense, and tasked with advancing its cause.
In return for your faithful service, you will be furnished with various rewards, some of which may well prove useful to you in your other endeavors.

If you are agonizing over which of the Grand Companies best deserves your loyalty, be at ease─the commitment you make this day need not be permanent. Should you wish to shift your allegiance at a later date, you are entitled to do so. And yet...I concede that it is no small choice you face...
Ah! A thought occurs to me! You will, of course, recall that the three city-states are planning to hold remembrance services.
Well, as part of the proceedings, I am given to understand that the leader of each Grand Company will deliver an address.
Hearing these addresses ought to help you make an informed decision. What say you, my dear officers?
A fine suggestion!
You are as wise as you are beautiful, my lady!
Very well! Let Forename hear our leaders speak, then return here with his / her decision.
We eagerly await your answer!

I know full well that adventurers are by their nature a liberty-loving breed, and not best suited to the discipline of military service, but I strongly urge you to join a Grand Company nonetheless. While the promise of reward is enticing in itself, it is not the only benefit.
You are possessed of great power, Forename , and with it you are capable of doing untold good. Yet know that great power is wont to attract attention─not all of it friendly.

There will be those who wish you ill, and you must needs be on the lookout for them. Yet however vigilant you are, you are but one man / woman . In the midst of a Grand Company, however, you will be one man / woman amongst many─a friend amongst friends. Your achievements will be shared, and so will the danger. I can think of no better arrangement.
Of course, joining one organization need not mean leaving another. I hope that we can continue to rely upon your aid─the Twelve know that we will have need of it in the days ahead.
The Grand Companies seek to protect their own nations. We Scions, on the other hand, seek to preserve the future of Eorzea as a whole. Similar, yet not quite the same.
dialogues.text: แกรนด์คอมปะนีมุ่งหวังจะปกป้องประเทศของตน แต่พวกเราชาวไซออนส์กลับมุ่งมั่นรักษาอนาคตในภาพรวมของเอโอลเซีย ช่างคล้ายคลึงกัน ทว่าหาได้เหมือนกันทั้งหมดไม่

dialogues.text_en: Now then, I expect that you will be afield more often in the future.
dialogues.text: เอาละ ต่อจากนี้ไป ฉันคาดว่าคุณคงต้องออกตระเวนเดินทางบ่อยครั้งขึ้น

dialogues.text_en: As such, I would have you carry this linkpearl with you at all times. It will allow us to stay in touch regardless of location.
dialogues.text: เพราะฉะนั้น ฉันจึงอยากให้คุณพกไข่มุกสื่อสารนี้ติดตัวไว้ตลอดเวลา เพื่อจะได้ติดต่อกันได้เสมอไม่ว่าจะอยู่ที่ไหนก็ตาม

dialogues.text_en: Eorzea is changing, Forename , and you have the power to help shape it anew.
dialogues.text: เอโอลเซียกำลังเปลี่ยนแปลงไปนะ Forename และคุณเองก็มีพลังที่จะช่วยสร้างสรรค์ดินแดนนี้ขึ้นใหม่

dialogues.text_en: None can say what the morrow will bring, but so long as we believe in ourselves, there is naught we cannot achieve.
dialogues.text: ไม่มีใครบอกได้ว่าวันพรุ่งนี้จะนำพาสิ่งใดมา ทว่าตราบใดที่พวกเรายังเชื่อมั่นในตัวเอง ก็ไม่มีสิ่งใดที่เกินความสามารถ of พวกเราไปได้

dialogues.text_en: Now, it is time you made ready for your journey. Before you depart, be sure to speak to Tataru. She will apprise you as to where and when the remembrance services are due to take place.
dialogues.text: เอาละ ได้เวลาเตรียมตัวออกเดินทางแล้ว ก่อนออกเดินทาง อย่าลืมแวะคุยกับทาทารุเสียก่อน เพื่อสอบถามกำหนดการและสถานที่จัดพิธีรำลึก

dialogues.text_en: The Elder Seedseer speaks only truth, and her words have the power to touch the soul. At the sound of her voice, all fall silent and attend her.
dialogues.text: ท่านเอลเดอร์ซีดเซียร์กล่าวแต่ความจริงแท้เท่านั้น วาจาของท่านช่างเปี่ยมด้วยพลังที่สะกดจิตวิญญาณของผู้คน ยามได้ยินสุรเสียง ทุกผู้คนต่างพากันเงียบกริบเพื่อตั้งใจรับฟัง

dialogues.text_en: The Flame General is a passionate man, and his words never fail to light a fire in the belly of those who listen. I am sure you will be no exception!
dialogues.text: ท่านนายพลเฟลมเป็นคนเปี่ยมด้วยความมุ่งมั่นอันแรงกล้า วาจาของท่านจุดไฟในอกของผู้ฟังได้เสมอ และผมมั่นใจว่าคุณเองก็ไม่ยกเว้นแน่!

dialogues.text_en: When the Admiral speaks, even pirates listen, and that is no small thing. She is a born leader─the kind one would gladly follow to the seventh hell!
dialogues.text: ยามที่ท่านพลเรือเอกเอ่ยปาก แม้แต่พวกโจรสลัดยังตั้งใจฟัง ซึ่งนั่นไม่ใช่เรื่องเล็กน้อยเลยนะ ท่านคือผู้นำโดยกำเนิด—ผู้นำที่ผู้คนพร้อมจะติดตามไปจนถึงขุมนรกที่เจ็ด!

dialogues.text_en: Speeches? Oh, yes, I love them. There's nothing like a good exposition when you're having trouble sleeping!
dialogues.text: การปราศรัยเหรอ อ๊ะ ใช่แล้ว! ฉันชอบที่สุดเลยล่ะ เวลาที่นอนไม่ค่อยหลับเนี่ย การฟังบรรยายยาวๆ ช่วยกล่อมให้เคลิ้มหลับได้ดีที่สุดเลยเนอะ!

dialogues.text_en: Five years ago, the three Grand Companies joined as one and fought the Garlean Empire at the Carteneau Flats.
And now, for the first time, the people will gather to remember those who fell in the battle.
That being said, no one has any clear memory of what transpired that fateful day—not even the leaders of each nation.
<crunch> <crunch> ... <crunch> <crunch> ...Oh, hello again, laddie / lassie ! Meet Percevains—we was thick as thieves in the old days. Least, I think we was.
...Or it might've been that he was a right creepy bastard, an' I did me best t' avoid him. Still, we was both members o' the old order, so either way we're in this together, eh?
You've put us all to shame with your recent performance in the field. If I'm to keep up, I daresay I'll need bigger knives!
Everythin' looks to be in order. Right—on to the next customer...
I must confess, I do rather miss that obnoxious Miqo'te's company.
A'aba is taking part in a joint operation with the Immortal Flames. I imagine he's having the time of his life right now.
An experienced warrior like A'aba won't die so easily. He's strong, fast, cunning... Aye, he'll come back safe.
I have heard word of your deeds. I am sparing in my praise, so know that you have truly impressed me.
dialogues.text: ข่าวคราวเรื่องความดีความชอบของท่านแว่วมาถึงหูฉันแล้ว ปกติฉันไม่ค่อยเอ่ยปากชมใครนักหรอกนะ ดังนั้น ขอให้รู้ไว้เถอะว่าท่านทำให้ฉันประทับใจได้อย่างแท้จริง

dialogues.text_en: Be that as it may, it is fortunate that Thancred arrived when he did. Had he been but a moment later, I shudder to think what may have transpired.
dialogues.text: ถึงอย่างนั้นก็นับว่าโชคดีเหลือเกินที่ธานเครดไปถึงที่นั่นได้ทันเวลา หากช้ากว่านั้นไปเพียงชั่วอึดใจเดียว ฉันยังนึกเสียวสันหลังวาบยามคิดถึงสิ่งที่จะเกิดขึ้นตามมา

dialogues.text_en: The destruction that visitied this land cannot be attributed to the forces of the Empire alone.
dialogues.text: ความพินาศย่อยยับที่มาเยือนดินแดนแห่งนี้ หาได้เกิดจากน้ำมือของกองทัพจักรวรรดิแต่เพียงฝ่ายเดียวไม่

dialogues.text_en: Wyrm of midnight, of breath infernal. For some, a legend made flesh; for others, an insidious symbol of memory lost.
dialogues.text: มังกรแห่งรัตติกาลผู้พ่นลมหายใจโลกันตร์ สำหรับบางคน คือตำนานอันมีเลือดเนื้อ ทว่าสำหรับบางคน กลับเป็นสัญลักษณ์อันร้ายกาจของความทรงจำที่สูญหาย

dialogues.text_en: We grasp but a piece of this puzzle. Much and more must we question and contemplate ere the fallen moon revealeth its myriad secrets.
dialogues.text: เรากุมไว้เพียงเศษเสี้ยวของปริศนาชิ้นนี้ ยังต้องตั้งคำถามและขบคิดอีกมากมายนัก ก่อนดวงจันทร์ที่ร่วงหล่นจะยอมเผยความลับอันนับไม่ถ้วนออกมา

dialogues.text_en: I, um... I'm sorry about all the attention you're getting, Forename ... I might have sung your praises a little too loudly...and often...to a few too many people. Ahem. Next time, I'll be sure to hold my tongue─literally, if necessary.
dialogues.text: คือ... หนูต้องขอโทษด้วยนะคะที่ทำให้ท่านต้องกลายเป็นจุดสนใจขนาดนี้... ท่าน Forename หนูอาจจะพูดชมท่านเสียงดังไปหน่อย... แถมยังบ่อย... และพูดกับคนมากหน้าหลายตาเกินไปนิดนึงค่ะ เอ่อ... คราวหน้าหนูจะระวังปากระวังคำให้ดีเลยค่ะ—หรือยอมกัดลิ้นตัวเองไม่พูดอะไรเลยถ้าจำเป็น

dialogues.text_en: Anyway, I expect you want to know where and when the remembrance services are taking place?
dialogues.text: เอาละค่ะ หนูคิดว่าท่านคงอยากทราบแล้วใช่ไหมคะว่าพิธีรำลึกจะจัดขึ้นที่ไหนและเมื่อไหร่

dialogues.text_en: If all goes to plan, Gridania's Grand Company, the Order of the Twin Adder, will hold the first of the three services, and Elder Seedseer Kan-E-Senna will deliver her address at Mih Khetto's Amphitheatre.
dialogues.text: หากทุกอย่างเป็นไปตามแผน ภาคีทวินแอดเดอร์ซึ่งเป็นแกรนด์คอมปะนีแห่งกริดาเนียจะจัดพิธีรำลึกเป็นแห่งแรกจากทั้งหมดสามแห่ง และท่านเอลเดอร์ซีดเซียร์ กาน-เอ-เซนนา จะขึ้นกล่าวปราศรัย ณ อัฒจันทร์มิห์เคตโตค่ะ

dialogues.text_en: I should probably mention at this point that due to the organizational challenges involved in assembling all of the involved parties, it's possible that the order of the services might change... Still, there's not much we can do about that, so make Gridania your first port of call.
dialogues.text: แต่หนูต้องขอแจ้งไว้ก่อนนะคะว่า เนื่องจากความยุ่งยากในการประสานงานระหว่างผู้จัดงานทุกฝ่าย ลำดับการจัดพิธีของแต่ละภาคีจึงอาจสับเปลี่ยนไปจากเดิมบ้าง... ถึงอย่างนั้นพวกเราก็ทำอะไรไม่ได้มากนัก ดังนั้น ขอให้ท่านมุ่งหน้าไปยังกริดาเนียเป็นแห่งแรกก่อนนะคะ

dialogues.text_en: Next, you'll need to go to Ul'dah, where Flame General Raubahn Aldynn will be addressing the masses at the Royal Promenade. Oh, and it's rumored there's to be a special guest! How exciting.
dialogues.text: จากนั้น ท่านต้องเดินทางไปยังอุลดาห์ ซึ่งท่านนายพลเฟลม ราอูบาน อัลดีน จะขึ้นกล่าวปราศรัยต่อหน้าฝูงชน ณ รอยัล โพรเมนาด ค่ะ โอ้ แว่วเสียงลือกันหนาหูว่าแขกรับเชิญสุดพิเศษจะมาร่วมงานด้วยนะคะ! ช่างน่าตื่นเต้นจริงๆ เลยค่ะ

dialogues.text_en: Last but not least, you must make your way to the Stateroom in Limsa Lominsa, where Maelstrom Chief Admiral Merlwyb Bloefhiswyn will be giving her address.
The room is accessible via the Admiral's Lift. Identify yourself to the sentry, Zanthael, and he will admit you. Got all that?

Well, off you go, then. I hope you find the remembrance services suitably educational! I suggest visiting the city-states in my prescribed order, though with your record of impeccable timing and luck, the schedule may well change in favor of your preferred travel plans. Farewell!
Some people let fame swell their heads, but I believe that your will remain in proportion and firmly attached to your body!
I lost my son to the Calamity.
The three Seedseers are all together!
Some say you couldn't take a step without stumbling over a body.
Our forebears were once strangers in the Twelveswood.
Fearful of the greenwrath, they hid themselves in the dark recesses of the earth. Yet they dreamed of basking in the dappled sunlight of the forest.
Through great effort, they proved their worth to the elementals, and were granted a place beneath the boughs. So it was that Gridania was born, some five centuries ago.
Working hand in hand, the Hyur and the Elezen settlers sowed the seeds of our civilization. And soon they were joined by folk of all races.
So nourished by the waters of unity and blessed by the light of the Matron, Gridania flourished into the great nation it is today.
Do you see the Gridanian standard? There, hanging behind the Elder Seedseer.
The entwined serpents represent the unity between Hyur and Elezen. An elegant symbol, do you not agree?
In accordance with the will of the elementals, we have embraced a life of peace. Alas, our neighbors have not always sought the same for themselves─nor for us.
Though we Gridanians have no love for war, we have still less for those who would threaten our way of life. Ever have we fought to protect the sanctity of the Twelveswood.
When the Garlean Empire brought its war of conquest to Eorzea, we rallied under the noble standard of the Twin Adder, that we might push back the encroaching darkness.
And it was we who prepared the ground for the reformation of the Eorzean Alliance, that all the peoples of this realm might stand united against the common threat.
Five years ago, the Alliance met the armies of the Empire upon the fields of Carteneau.
It would prove the bloodiest battle in recent memory. Countless Gridanian lives were lost.
As supreme commander of the Order of the Twin Adder, ever shall I bear the weight of our people's sacrifice.
Alas, their loss was not the only tragedy to befall us that day, for soon came the Calamity.
The scars borne by our forest are a constant reminder of its violence. Our lives have been irrevocably changed, each waking hour a struggle to survive.
Driven to desperation, some among us have strayed from the path of righteousness, resorting to banditry, poaching, and other unconscionable deeds.
To compound our woes, the Ixal have returned in force, emboldened by our suffering. They test our defenses nigh without cease, and prey upon the vulnerable.
So beleaguered from within and without, it is of little wonder that our unity now falters. Dark times are upon us.
Time was, a man could walk the highroads without fear.
A pox on the bloody Ixal!
On this day, five years ago, countless Eorzeans laid down their lives that we might behold another dawn. Please join with me in honoring their memory.
And how do you propose to honor the memory of those you cannot remember, pray tell?
The destruction wrought by the Calamity was indiscriminate─it dealt death to Eorzean and Garlean alike.
dialogues.text: ความพินาศย่อยยับอันเกิดจากมหันตภัยนั้นไม่เลือกปฏิบัติ คร่าชีวิตทั้งชาวเอโอลเซียและชาวการ์เลียนไปไม่ต่างกัน

dialogues.text_en: Yet while we have labored to rebuild our homes─to rebuild our lives─the Empire has set about raising steel fortresses here in the Twelveswood.
dialogues.text: ทว่าในขณะที่เราเพียรพยายามบูรณะบ้านเรือนและฟื้นฟูชีวิตขึ้นมาใหม่ จักรวรรดิต่างลงมือสร้างป้อมปราการเหล็กกล้าขึ้นในทเวลฟส์วูดแห่งนี้

dialogues.text_en: Let none be mistaken─the Garleans remain the greatest threat to our survival. If we are to stand against them, we must remember what it is to be united.
dialogues.text: อย่าได้เข้าใจไขว้เขวเป็นอันขาด ชาวการ์เลียนยังคงเป็นภัยคุกคามร้ายแรงที่สุดต่อความอยู่รอดของเรา หากคิดจะหยัดยืนต่อสู้ เราต้องระลึกให้ได้ว่าการรวมเป็นน้ำหนึ่งใจเดียวกันนั้นเป็นเช่นไร

dialogues.text_en: Our many troubles blind us to the woes of our fellow man. Thence is harmony lost. Yet harmony is the founding principle of Gridania.
dialogues.text: ปัญหาอันรุมเร้าทำให้เรามืดบอดต่อความทุกข์ยากของเพื่อนมนุษย์ ความกลมเกลียวจึงสูญสลายไป ทว่าความกลมเกลียวคือหลักการแรกเริ่มในการก่อตั้งกริดาเนีย

dialogues.text_en: We are gathered here to honor the fallen.
dialogues.text: เรามารวมตัวกัน ณ ที่นี้เพื่อเชิดชูเกียรติผู้ล่วงลับ

dialogues.text_en: Let them be honored not only in word and thought, but through concerted action!
dialogues.text: จงร่วมเชิดชูเกียรติ ไม่เพียงแต่ด้วยคำพูดและจิตรำลึก แต่ด้วยการร่วมใจลงมือปฏิบัติ!

dialogues.text_en: I bid you join hands with me once more beneath the Twin Adder standard!
dialogues.text: ข้าพเจ้าขอเชิญชวนให้ท่านมาร่วมประสานมือกับข้าพเจ้าอีกครั้ง ภายใต้ผืนธงทวินแอดเดอร์!

dialogues.text_en: And together, let us heal the forest's wounds, that our progeny might live in harmony beneath these ancient boughs. For serenity, purity, and sanctity!
dialogues.text: และเราจะร่วมเยียวยาบาดแผลของผืนป่าไปด้วยกัน เพื่อให้ลูกหลานของเราได้อยู่อย่างกลมเกลียวภายใต้กิ่งก้านไม้อันแสนเก่าแก่เหล่านี้ เพื่อความสงบสุข ความบริสุทธิ์ และความศักดิ์สิทธิ์!

dialogues.text_en: We must think of the children!
dialogues.text: เราต้องนึกถึงพวกเด็กๆ นะ!

dialogues.text_en: Wood's will be done!
dialogues.text: เป็นไปตามเจตจำนงแห่งพงไพร!

dialogues.text_en: It's up to us to protect the forest.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] It's up to us to protect the forest.

dialogues.text_en: For the elementals!
dialogues.text: หากตัดสินใจรับข้อเสนอของพวกเรา—ซึ่งผมหวังอย่างยิ่งว่าจะเป็นเช่นนั้น—โปรดไปคุยกับโมโมดิ เจ้าของร้านควิกแซนด์เป็นสหายสนิทของพวกเรา จะบอกทางมาพบพวกเราให้เอง

dialogues.text_en: If you'll permit me. Alphinaud.
dialogues.text: เดี๋ยยยวก่อนนะ—พวกเรายังไม่ได้บอกชื่อภาคีให้ฟังเลยด้วยซ้ำ! พวกเราคือทายาทแห่งรุ่งอรุณที่เจ็ด ผู้พิทักษ์ความยุติธรรมยังไงล่ะ! อ๊ะ แต่ห้ามบอกใครเชียวนะ ยกเว้นโมโมดิ เพราะรายนั้นรู้อยู่แล้วล่ะ

dialogues.text_en: ...And my sister, Alisaie, at your service.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] ...And my sister, Alisaie, at your service.

dialogues.text_en: I saw at a glance that you were a fellow traveler.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I saw at a glance that you were a fellow traveler.

dialogues.text_en: You might call us students of history, sampling the realm's remembrances in pursuit of...enlightenment.
dialogues.text: ฉันเฝ้ามองท่านอย่างใกล้ชิดมาโดยตลอด นับตั้งแต่บินออกจากลิมซา โลมินซา

dialogues.text_en: The Gridanians are unfortunate enough to have to contend with two beast tribes.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Gridanians are unfortunate enough to have to contend with two beast tribes.

dialogues.text_en: The Ixal are unquestionably the more troublesome, being of a naturally warlike disposition, and wont to summon their bloodthirsty primal, Garuda.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Ixal are unquestionably the more troublesome, being of a naturally warlike disposition, and wont to summon their bloodthirsty primal, Garuda.

dialogues.text_en: The sylphs, by contrast, are peaceful in nature, being mischievous rather than malevolent, and have long been on friendly terms with the Gridanians─until recently, at least. Alas, they have grown aloof, a change observed at roughly the time they summoned the primal Ramuh.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The sylphs, by contrast, are peaceful in nature, being mischievous rather than malevolent, and have long been on friendly terms with the Gridanians─until recently, at least. Alas, they have grown aloof, a change observed at roughly the time they summoned the primal Ramuh.

dialogues.text_en: The Gridanians have no love for war, and they consider open conflict a last resort.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Gridanians have no love for war, and they consider open conflict a last resort.

dialogues.text_en: Though they clash with the Ixal ever more regularly, you may be assured that they do so in self-defense. As for the sylphs...they are as yet bound by a peace treaty, though one wonders how long it will be before it is broken.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Though they clash with the Ixal ever more regularly, you may be assured that they do so in self-defense. As for the sylphs...they are as yet bound by a peace treaty, though one wonders how long it will be before it is broken.

dialogues.text_en: The Twelveswood was grievously wounded during the Calamity, leaving Gridania vulnerable to attack. The people are hopeful that restoring the wood─and thereby the power of the elementals─will put an end to their woes. Yet how long will that take? Centuries , I'd wager.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Twelveswood was grievously wounded during the Calamity, leaving Gridania vulnerable to attack. The people are hopeful that restoring the wood─and thereby the power of the elementals─will put an end to their woes. Yet how long will that take? Centuries , I'd wager.

dialogues.text_en: Meanwhile, the Ixal will continue their incursions, spurred on by Garuda and her insatiable appetite for destruction.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Meanwhile, the Ixal will continue their incursions, spurred on by Garuda and her insatiable appetite for destruction.

dialogues.text_en: Whether the Gridanians like it or not, sooner or later it will come to all-out war. And when it does, the Order of the Twin Adder will need all the help it can muster.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Whether the Gridanians like it or not, sooner or later it will come to all-out war. And when it does, the Order of the Twin Adder will need all the help it can muster.

dialogues.text_en: ...How valuable might the aid of a capable adventurer prove to them then?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] ...How valuable might the aid of a capable adventurer prove to them then?

dialogues.text_en: Well, perhaps we will find out─if the Elder Seedseer's words fell on fertile ground...
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Well, perhaps we will find out─if the Elder Seedseer's words fell on fertile ground...

dialogues.text_en: Behold, 'tis the sultana Nanamo herself!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Behold, 'tis the sultana Nanamo herself!

dialogues.text_en: And General Raubahn as well!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] And General Raubahn as well!

dialogues.text_en: Hark you, souls of flame, drawn to the bosom of the desert, where the fire burns brightest and shall rage forevermore!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Hark you, souls of flame, drawn to the bosom of the desert, where the fire burns brightest and shall rage forevermore!

dialogues.text_en: Hoorah! Raubahn!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Hoorah! Raubahn!

dialogues.text_en: Where since antiquity, under the sage and judicious rule of the Ul Dynasty, we have wrought sand into gold!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Where since antiquity, under the sage and judicious rule of the Ul Dynasty, we have wrought sand into gold!

dialogues.text_en: Where by the Grace and Glory of Nald'thal have our brave sons and daughters flourished and prospered─I speak of Ul'dah!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Where by the Grace and Glory of Nald'thal have our brave sons and daughters flourished and prospered─I speak of Ul'dah!

dialogues.text_en: There, at the Flame General's back flies the Grand Company's standard.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] There, at the Flame General's back flies the Grand Company's standard.

dialogues.text_en: Note the sigil. The golden scales of order balance the jewel of prosperity with the flame of might.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Note the sigil. The golden scales of order balance the jewel of prosperity with the flame of might.

dialogues.text_en: Great and many are the gifts our nation has given the realm.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Great and many are the gifts our nation has given the realm.

dialogues.text_en: In Eorzea's darkest hour, on the killing fields of Carteneau, none spent more in blood and gold than we.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] In Eorzea's darkest hour, on the killing fields of Carteneau, none spent more in blood and gold than we.

dialogues.text_en: Thus was the VIIth Imperial Legion laid low!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Thus was the VIIth Imperial Legion laid low!

dialogues.text_en: So that's how it happened! How soon history forgets.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] So that's how it happened! How soon history forgets.

dialogues.text_en: Yet many left our gates, never to return.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yet many left our gates, never to return.

dialogues.text_en: Let us pray for our absent brothers and sisters, that they might know happiness in the great beyond, as Thal's honored guests.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Let us pray for our absent brothers and sisters, that they might know happiness in the great beyond, as Thal's honored guests.

dialogues.text_en: ' If the fates were fair, the price we paid that day would have bought us victory. Alas, they are not.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] ' If the fates were fair, the price we paid that day would have bought us victory. Alas, they are not.

dialogues.text_en: And now, but five years into this Seventh Umbral Era, the spirit of sacrifice which granted us our strength is all but dead.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] And now, but five years into this Seventh Umbral Era, the spirit of sacrifice which granted us our strength is all but dead.

dialogues.text_en: Look around you. What do you see? A people divided, downtrodden and enthralled!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Look around you. What do you see? A people divided, downtrodden and enthralled!

dialogues.text_en: Where are the merciful alms of the rich? Where is the just steel of the righteous?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Where are the merciful alms of the rich? Where is the just steel of the righteous?

dialogues.text_en: I ask you: is this the great nation our brothers and sisters gave their lives to save?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I ask you: is this the great nation our brothers and sisters gave their lives to save?

dialogues.text_en: You who call this “living” dishonor the name of the Immortal Flames─it is but a slow death!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] You who call this “living” dishonor the name of the Immortal Flames─it is but a slow death!

dialogues.text_en: Our enemies surround us. The savage hordes of the Amalj'aa wait beside our roads, strangling the lifelines of trade.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Our enemies surround us. The savage hordes of the Amalj'aa wait beside our roads, strangling the lifelines of trade.

dialogues.text_en: Meanwhile, the Garleans make mock of our borders, and despoil our land of its natural wealth.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Meanwhile, the Garleans make mock of our borders, and despoil our land of its natural wealth.

dialogues.text_en: We stand on a precipice...yet we do not act.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] We stand on a precipice...yet we do not act.

dialogues.text_en: Whether trader or soldier, Monetarist or Royalist, all must recognize that a divided Ul'dah stands to fall.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Whether trader or soldier, Monetarist or Royalist, all must recognize that a divided Ul'dah stands to fall.

dialogues.text_en: Victory and Fortune walk hand in hand!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Victory and Fortune walk hand in hand!

dialogues.text_en: Ye who seek glory and wealth! Look not to what little you can snatch from your neighbor, but to the boundless wealth of the world beyond!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Ye who seek glory and wealth! Look not to what little you can snatch from your neighbor, but to the boundless wealth of the world beyond!

dialogues.text_en: Now is the time to unite! Now is the time to ride forth!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Now is the time to unite! Now is the time to ride forth!

dialogues.text_en: In the name of the sultana, I beseech you!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] In the name of the sultana, I beseech you!

dialogues.text_en: Line not your own coffers, but those of the Immortal Flames! Seek not to prosper from Ul'dah, but to restore her to prosperity!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Line not your own coffers, but those of the Immortal Flames! Seek not to prosper from Ul'dah, but to restore her to prosperity!

dialogues.text_en: As the realm prospers, so shall Ul'dah. As Ul'dah prospers, so shall her people!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] As the realm prospers, so shall Ul'dah. As Ul'dah prospers, so shall her people!

dialogues.text_en: Yaah, for Ul'dah!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yaah, for Ul'dah!

dialogues.text_en: Together, we are one.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Together, we are one.

dialogues.text_en: Your Grace.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Your Grace.

dialogues.text_en: Raubahn.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Raubahn.

dialogues.text_en: People of Ul'dah! I, Nanamo, seventeenth in the line of Ul, address you.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] People of Ul'dah! I, Nanamo, seventeenth in the line of Ul, address you.

dialogues.text_en: Much has been made of the wealth of Ul'dah.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Much has been made of the wealth of Ul'dah.

dialogues.text_en: Yet those who measure that wealth in coins and carats are gravely deceived.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yet those who measure that wealth in coins and carats are gravely deceived.

dialogues.text_en: For the true wealth of Ul'dah lies in the health, happiness, and hopes of her people.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] For the true wealth of Ul'dah lies in the health, happiness, and hopes of her people.

dialogues.text_en: Beloved subjects, I bid you raise aloft the torch of Ul'dah, that her Flames might serve as a beacon for all Eorzea to see!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Beloved subjects, I bid you raise aloft the torch of Ul'dah, that her Flames might serve as a beacon for all Eorzea to see!

dialogues.text_en: Long live Nanamo!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Long live Nanamo!

dialogues.text_en: Glory to the Sultana!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Glory to the Sultana!

dialogues.text_en: For Victory and Fortune, stride fearless into the inferno, for we are by fire reborn!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] For Victory and Fortune, stride fearless into the inferno, for we are by fire reborn!

dialogues.text_en: Forsooth!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Forsooth!

dialogues.text_en: The time is nigh!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The time is nigh!

dialogues.text_en: I BELIEVE!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I BELIEVE!

dialogues.text_en: Fancy meeting you again.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Fancy meeting you again.

dialogues.text_en: The Ul'dahns have a long history of conflict with the Amalj'aa, the beast tribe that worships the primal Ifrit.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Ul'dahns have a long history of conflict with the Amalj'aa, the beast tribe that worships the primal Ifrit.

dialogues.text_en: Judging by your look of distaste, I take it you have encountered them.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Judging by your look of distaste, I take it you have encountered them.

dialogues.text_en: The Ul'dahns do not shy from confrontation. If aught threatens their precious prosperity, they will seek to crush it.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Ul'dahns do not shy from confrontation. If aught threatens their precious prosperity, they will seek to crush it.

dialogues.text_en: So have they dealt with Ifrit thus far, smothering his flames each time he is stoked to life.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] So have they dealt with Ifrit thus far, smothering his flames each time he is stoked to life.

dialogues.text_en: Yet he is but one of several problems. Though they have been quiet these past five years, the Garleans have not gone away.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yet he is but one of several problems. Though they have been quiet these past five years, the Garleans have not gone away.

dialogues.text_en: Meanwhile, refugees continue to arrive in droves, and Ul'dah has no clear policy on how to deal with them.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Meanwhile, refugees continue to arrive in droves, and Ul'dah has no clear policy on how to deal with them.

dialogues.text_en: After all, not even the sultanate's coffers are bottomless. And even assuming they had the coin, resources will ever be finite.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] After all, not even the sultanate's coffers are bottomless. And even assuming they had the coin, resources will ever be finite.

dialogues.text_en: Which brings me back to the subject of Ifrit. It has been observed that the Amalj'aa are summoning him with ever-increasing frequency.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Which brings me back to the subject of Ifrit. It has been observed that the Amalj'aa are summoning him with ever-increasing frequency.

dialogues.text_en: Every time they do so, the Ul'dahns send their forces to smite the primal, and though they invariably succeed, each victory is bought with blood. It is a war of attrition which they cannot well sustain.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Every time they do so, the Ul'dahns send their forces to smite the primal, and though they invariably succeed, each victory is bought with blood. It is a war of attrition which they cannot well sustain.

dialogues.text_en: Small wonder, then, that the Immortal Flames are eager to recruit more members.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Small wonder, then, that the Immortal Flames are eager to recruit more members.

dialogues.text_en: At such a desperate hour, an adventurer of your experience would be a most welcome addition to their ranks.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] At such a desperate hour, an adventurer of your experience would be a most welcome addition to their ranks.

dialogues.text_en: Here to attend the remembrance service? Be quick─the Admiral is due to give her address at any moment.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Here to attend the remembrance service? Be quick─the Admiral is due to give her address at any moment.

dialogues.text_en: If you're not interested in attending, make way for those who are.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] If you're not interested in attending, make way for those who are.

dialogues.text_en: The Garleans are another matter altogether.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Garleans are another matter altogether.

dialogues.text_en: So much for our alliance.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] So much for our alliance.

dialogues.text_en: It's sunk beyond the seabed.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] It's sunk beyond the seabed.

dialogues.text_en: Brothers and sisters of the sea, hearken unto me! Look upon this, our mighty crimson standard, and tell me your hearts do not swell with pride!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Brothers and sisters of the sea, hearken unto me! Look upon this, our mighty crimson standard, and tell me your hearts do not swell with pride!

dialogues.text_en: Seven hundred summers have come and gone since our forefathers first ran aground in this fertile bay.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Seven hundred summers have come and gone since our forefathers first ran aground in this fertile bay.

dialogues.text_en: In that time, guided by the Mother of Oceans, Limsa Lominsa has grown from humble fishing village to uncontested ruler of the five seas and beyond!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] In that time, guided by the Mother of Oceans, Limsa Lominsa has grown from humble fishing village to uncontested ruler of the five seas and beyond!

dialogues.text_en: Did you look, as the Admiral bid you? It is a rather stirring standard, I must say.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Did you look, as the Admiral bid you? It is a rather stirring standard, I must say.

dialogues.text_en: The crimson field is meant to signify the blood of fallen crewmates, while the black longship represents a pirate vessel.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The crimson field is meant to signify the blood of fallen crewmates, while the black longship represents a pirate vessel.

dialogues.text_en: When the Garlean Empire marched upon Eorzea, we assembled beneath the Maelstrom's standard, and our Grand Company was reborn.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] When the Garlean Empire marched upon Eorzea, we assembled beneath the Maelstrom's standard, and our Grand Company was reborn.

dialogues.text_en: All answered the call, from the Knights of the Barracuda to Hyllfyr's Bloody Executioners, and together we met our would-be conquerors upon the field of Carteneau.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] All answered the call, from the Knights of the Barracuda to Hyllfyr's Bloody Executioners, and together we met our would-be conquerors upon the field of Carteneau.

dialogues.text_en: That day, the world bore witness to the united strength of Limsa Lominsa!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] That day, the world bore witness to the united strength of Limsa Lominsa!

dialogues.text_en: I swear to you─no army ever fought harder, or with more courage. Yet many of ours did not survive.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I swear to you─no army ever fought harder, or with more courage. Yet many of ours did not survive.

dialogues.text_en: Join me now in remembering those who fought in the name of freedom, and fell. May their souls be returned to the sea.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Join me now in remembering those who fought in the name of freedom, and fell. May their souls be returned to the sea.

dialogues.text_en: Freedom... Yes, they have always been rather fond of their freedom.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Freedom... Yes, they have always been rather fond of their freedom.

dialogues.text_en: Much as the beast tribes have. Small wonder─beneath the surface, one would struggle to tell them apart.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Much as the beast tribes have. Small wonder─beneath the surface, one would struggle to tell them apart.

dialogues.text_en: It has been five long years since the Calamity struck. Five long years of tireless rebuilding.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] It has been five long years since the Calamity struck. Five long years of tireless rebuilding.

dialogues.text_en: Yet still the wounds of the Calamity fester and weep.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yet still the wounds of the Calamity fester and weep.

dialogues.text_en: But when I stand atop the Mizzenmast, and gaze out upon our battered and broken vessel, I see an undying spirit. Did we not build all this from the wreck of the Galadion all those centuries ago? Shall we not do so again!?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] But when I stand atop the Mizzenmast, and gaze out upon our battered and broken vessel, I see an undying spirit. Did we not build all this from the wreck of the Galadion all those centuries ago? Shall we not do so again!?

dialogues.text_en: Yet there are those who would see this ship of ours sink beneath the waves of the restless Rhotano.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Yet there are those who would see this ship of ours sink beneath the waves of the restless Rhotano.

dialogues.text_en: The Sahagin creep ashore seeking blood for their accursed god.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Sahagin creep ashore seeking blood for their accursed god.

dialogues.text_en: Those fishback bastards.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Those fishback bastards.

dialogues.text_en: The Sahagin have risen?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The Sahagin have risen?

dialogues.text_en: While the mines of O'Ghomoro spew forth kobolds who push ever south, despoiling our lands as they go.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] While the mines of O'Ghomoro spew forth kobolds who push ever south, despoiling our lands as they go.

dialogues.text_en: These savage beast tribes will be the first waves to crash against our creaking hull.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] These savage beast tribes will be the first waves to crash against our creaking hull.

dialogues.text_en: And behind them swells the grim tide of the Garlean Empire.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] And behind them swells the grim tide of the Garlean Empire.

dialogues.text_en: Even now, the curs fly their flags within our borders. Doubt not but that they will be upon us ere long.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Even now, the curs fly their flags within our borders. Doubt not but that they will be upon us ere long.

dialogues.text_en: We are well-nigh surrounded. Yet there are those among us who would rather turn their swords against their crewmates than our cannons against our foes.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] We are well-nigh surrounded. Yet there are those among us who would rather turn their swords against their crewmates than our cannons against our foes.

dialogues.text_en: How can we hope to repel our many enemies when mutiny breeds below deck?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] How can we hope to repel our many enemies when mutiny breeds below deck?

dialogues.text_en: There is but one course left to us!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] There is but one course left to us!

dialogues.text_en: One bearing that will bring us victory over the beast hordes and the Empire both, and see this ship safe to port.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] One bearing that will bring us victory over the beast hordes and the Empire both, and see this ship safe to port.

dialogues.text_en: We must mend the rift the Calamity has reopened 'twixt pirate and Maelstrom, and stand fast with our adventurer brothers against the coming tempest!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] We must mend the rift the Calamity has reopened 'twixt pirate and Maelstrom, and stand fast with our adventurer brothers against the coming tempest!

dialogues.text_en: Mark ye well: a crew without unity is no crew at all─'tis but a mass of drowned men.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Mark ye well: a crew without unity is no crew at all─'tis but a mass of drowned men.

dialogues.text_en: To me, then, brothers and sisters of the sea! Gather beneath the undying crimson standard and pledge me your strength, your skill, your wisdom!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] To me, then, brothers and sisters of the sea! Gather beneath the undying crimson standard and pledge me your strength, your skill, your wisdom!

dialogues.text_en: And with the guidance of the Navigator, this great vessel of ours shall ride the waves till sea swallows all!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] And with the guidance of the Navigator, this great vessel of ours shall ride the waves till sea swallows all!

dialogues.text_en: Long live the admiral!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Long live the admiral!

dialogues.text_en: Admiral Merlwyb!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Admiral Merlwyb!

dialogues.text_en: Gather the lads!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Gather the lads!

dialogues.text_en: Haha, where's me cutlass?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Haha, where's me cutlass?

dialogues.text_en: I'll follow ye to the seven hells, Admiral!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I'll follow ye to the seven hells, Admiral!

dialogues.text_en: Fancy meeting you again.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Fancy meeting you again.

dialogues.text_en: As the Admiral mentioned in her address, Limsa Lominsa is plagued by two beast tribes.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] As the Admiral mentioned in her address, Limsa Lominsa is plagued by two beast tribes.

dialogues.text_en: The first are the fishlike Sahagin, worshipers of the primal Leviathan.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The first are the fishlike Sahagin, worshipers of the primal Leviathan.

dialogues.text_en: The second are the kobolds, who dwell beneath the earth, and take the primal Titan for their god.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The second are the kobolds, who dwell beneath the earth, and take the primal Titan for their god.

dialogues.text_en: As if the beast tribes' presence weren't troublesome enough, the Garleans have also chosen to erect a fortress right in the Lominsans' backyard.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] As if the beast tribes' presence weren't troublesome enough, the Garleans have also chosen to erect a fortress right in the Lominsans' backyard.

dialogues.text_en: And that is to say naught of internal strife. As a nation of pirates, there is no end to the blood feuds between the various factions. And while they fight amongst themselves, the Garleans whet their blades and watch.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] And that is to say naught of internal strife. As a nation of pirates, there is no end to the blood feuds between the various factions. And while they fight amongst themselves, the Garleans whet their blades and watch.

dialogues.text_en: If the Lominsans are to have any hope of withstanding the Empire, they must first resolve their own affairs. Differences must be set aside, and the primal threat dealt with once and for all.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] If the Lominsans are to have any hope of withstanding the Empire, they must first resolve their own affairs. Differences must be set aside, and the primal threat dealt with once and for all.

dialogues.text_en: To this end, I expect that they will soon take decisive action against the beast tribes. Mark my words, the Maelstrom standard will be drenched a deeper shade of crimson ere long.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] To this end, I expect that they will soon take decisive action against the beast tribes. Mark my words, the Maelstrom standard will be drenched a deeper shade of crimson ere long.

dialogues.text_en: That a capable adventurer like you would be a valuable addition to their crew is beyond question.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] That a capable adventurer like you would be a valuable addition to their crew is beyond question.

dialogues.text_en: Forename , this is Minfilia. You are well, I hope? Would I be correct in thinking that the final remembrance service has now concluded?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Forename , this is Minfilia. You are well, I hope? Would I be correct in thinking that the final remembrance service has now concluded?

dialogues.text_en: A moment ago, you say? What a coincidence!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] A moment ago, you say? What a coincidence!

dialogues.text_en: Jesting aside, I trust you remember our guests from the Grand Companies? Well, delighted though we are to have them here at the Waking Sands, it would not do to keep them in suspense any longer than necessary. In short: hurry back!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Jesting aside, I trust you remember our guests from the Grand Companies? Well, delighted though we are to have them here at the Waking Sands, it would not do to keep them in suspense any longer than necessary. In short: hurry back!

dialogues.text_en: Welcome back, Forename . Were the Grand Company leaders' words as illuminating as you had hoped?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Welcome back, Forename . Were the Grand Company leaders' words as illuminating as you had hoped?

dialogues.text_en: Aye, each nation is beset with problems. I trust you see now why your services are in such demand. Would that there were more of you, Forename .
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Aye, each nation is beset with problems. I trust you see now why your services are in such demand. Would that there were more of you, Forename .

dialogues.text_en: But you must be tired from your journey. Why don't you rest awhile, and take a moment to reflect on your decision? Once your mind is made up, pray give the Grand Company officers your answer.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] But you must be tired from your journey. Why don't you rest awhile, and take a moment to reflect on your decision? Once your mind is made up, pray give the Grand Company officers your answer.

dialogues.text_en: The gods only know what “grand” company our adventurer friend will keep.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The gods only know what “grand” company our adventurer friend will keep.

dialogues.text_en: Hmph. The wheels of change are in motion regardless.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Hmph. The wheels of change are in motion regardless.

dialogues.text_en: Brother, are you certain this course is best?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Brother, are you certain this course is best?

dialogues.text_en: Whatever do you mean, dear sister?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Whatever do you mean, dear sister?

dialogues.text_en: The so-called “remembrance” ceremonies were little more than standard-waving rallies.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The so-called “remembrance” ceremonies were little more than standard-waving rallies.

dialogues.text_en: ...As though the Calamity and Seventh Umbral Era warranted scarcely a mention!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] ...As though the Calamity and Seventh Umbral Era warranted scarcely a mention!

dialogues.text_en: Well, of course they were “standard-waving rallies.”
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Well, of course they were “standard-waving rallies.”

dialogues.text_en: Since you are so observant, mayhap you noticed what mention was made of the Warriors of Light? None .
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Since you are so observant, mayhap you noticed what mention was made of the Warriors of Light? None .

dialogues.text_en: I suppose they must have forgotten the heroes who spared Eorzea a fate worse than the Calamity?
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I suppose they must have forgotten the heroes who spared Eorzea a fate worse than the Calamity?

dialogues.text_en: No, dear Alisaie, they haven't “forgotten” these details. They have elected to omit them.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] No, dear Alisaie, they haven't “forgotten” these details. They have elected to omit them.

dialogues.text_en: Deep are the wounds the Calamity inflicted upon Eorzea. So deep, in fact, that the realm still bleeds.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Deep are the wounds the Calamity inflicted upon Eorzea. So deep, in fact, that the realm still bleeds.

dialogues.text_en: Needless to say, the beast tribes and their primals do little to alleviate the pain.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Needless to say, the beast tribes and their primals do little to alleviate the pain.

dialogues.text_en: So the task of salving Eorzea's wounds falls to the Scions of the Seventh Dawn—with a little help from our friends the Grand Companies.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] So the task of salving Eorzea's wounds falls to the Scions of the Seventh Dawn—with a little help from our friends the Grand Companies.

dialogues.text_en: Remembrance will yield no remedy. If our world is to heal, we must put the horrors of the Calamity behind us.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Remembrance will yield no remedy. If our world is to heal, we must put the horrors of the Calamity behind us.

dialogues.text_en: Our grandfather would never entrust the fate of the realm to despots who rewrite history to their convenience!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Our grandfather would never entrust the fate of the realm to despots who rewrite history to their convenience!

dialogues.text_en: There must be another way to cure what ails this world─and I mean to find it!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] There must be another way to cure what ails this world─and I mean to find it!

dialogues.text_en: You are most welcome to try. Our paths may differ, but our destination is the same. In time, I daresay we will see eye to eye.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] You are most welcome to try. Our paths may differ, but our destination is the same. In time, I daresay we will see eye to eye.

dialogues.text_en: I should hope so.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] I should hope so.

dialogues.text_en: M-M-My lady!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] M-M-My lady!

dialogues.text_en: We are to escort you!
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] We are to escort you!

dialogues.text_en: Hope does not come into it. We share the burden of this fate, dear sister, and will prevail together or not at all.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] Hope does not come into it. We share the burden of this fate, dear sister, and will prevail together or not at all.

dialogues.text_en: The salve will serve not only to close up our present wounds...
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] The salve will serve not only to close up our present wounds...

dialogues.text_en: ...but prevent old ones from opening anew.
dialogues.text: [NEEDS_REVIEW] ...but prevent old ones from opening anew.
